title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§1213.5. Rules and regulations

            The secretary of the department shall adopt and promulgate rules and regulations necessary to carry out the provisions of this Part in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

            Acts 1991, No. 411, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.195 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1213.5.  Rules and regulations
The secretary of the department shall adopt and promulgate rules and regulations
necessary to carry out the provisions of this Part in accordance with the Administrative
Procedure Act.
Acts 1991, No. 411, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1299.195 by HCR 84 of 2015
R.S.
